title: Drawer Sort
description: Do you like a cluttered space exactly where everything has its place? It is time to organize your life and become a tidying hero, conquering chaos one drawer at a time. Be sure to plan ahead for this epic puzzle or you may find yourself with a messier hand than when you started! Each brain training task will challenge you to place various items in the right places. Youll have to aim for perfect precision if you want to make sure the objects fit snugly and achieve the ultimate tidy victory.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
